translations.en: O! Hisham indeed the intellect with knowledge so he said and that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas and what he understands them except al'almwn O! Hisham then dhm those who not they reason so he said and when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? and if/had kan their forefathers not they reason anything and not they are guided and said and mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma not he hears except d'a' and nda' sm bkm 'my fhm not they reason and said and from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf and if/had kanwa not they reason and said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla and said not they fight you jmy'a except in qra mhsnh or from behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a and their hearts shta that banhm qwm not they reason and said and tnswn yourselves and you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک the intellect with knowledge so he said اور that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas اور what he understands them except al'almwn اے Hisham then dhm those who نہیں they reason so he said اور when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? اور if/had kan their forefathers نہیں they reason anything اور نہیں they are guided اور said اور mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma نہیں he hears except d'a' اور nda' sm bkm 'my fhm نہیں they reason اور said اور from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf اور if/had kanwa نہیں they reason اور said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla اور said نہیں they fight you jmy'a except میں qra mhsnh or سے behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a اور their hearts shta that banhm qwm نہیں they reason اور said اور tnswn yourselves اور you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak the intellect with knowledge so he said ve that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas ve what he understands them except al'almwn ey Hisham then dhm those who değil they reason so he said ve when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? ve if/had kan their forefathers değil they reason anything ve değil they are guided ve said ve mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma değil he hears except d'a' ve nda' sm bkm 'my fhm değil they reason ve said ve from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf ve if/had kanwa değil they reason ve said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla ve said değil they fight you jmy'a except içinde qra mhsnh or -den behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a ve their hearts shta that banhm qwm değil they reason ve said ve tnswn yourselves ve you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی the intellect with knowledge so he said و that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas و what he understands them except al'almwn ای Hisham then dhm those who نه they reason so he said و when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? و if/had kan their forefathers نه they reason anything و نه they are guided و said و mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma نه he hears except d'a' و nda' sm bkm 'my fhm نه they reason و said و from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf و if/had kanwa نه they reason و said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla و said نه they fight you jmy'a except در qra mhsnh or از behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a و their hearts shta that banhm qwm نه they reason و said و tnswn yourselves و you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.id: wahai Hisham sesungguhnya the intellect with knowledge so he said dan that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas dan what he understands them except al'almwn wahai Hisham then dhm those who tidak they reason so he said dan when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? dan if/had kan their forefathers tidak they reason anything dan tidak they are guided dan said dan mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma tidak he hears except d'a' dan nda' sm bkm 'my fhm tidak they reason dan said dan from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf dan if/had kanwa tidak they reason dan said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla dan said tidak they fight you jmy'a except di dalam qra mhsnh or dari behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a dan their hearts shta that banhm qwm tidak they reason dan said dan tnswn yourselves dan you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই the intellect with knowledge so he said এবং that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas এবং what he understands them except al'almwn হে Hisham then dhm those who না they reason so he said এবং when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? এবং if/had kan their forefathers না they reason anything এবং না they are guided এবং said এবং mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma না he hears except d'a' এবং nda' sm bkm 'my fhm না they reason এবং said এবং from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf এবং if/had kanwa না they reason এবং said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla এবং said না they fight you jmy'a except মধ্যে qra mhsnh or থেকে behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a এবং their hearts shta that banhm qwm না they reason এবং said এবং tnswn yourselves এবং you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente the intellect with knowledge so he said y that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas y what he understands them except al'almwn oh Hisham then dhm those who no they reason so he said y when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? y if/had kan their forefathers no they reason anything y no they are guided y said y mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma no he hears except d'a' y nda' sm bkm 'my fhm no they reason y said y from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf y if/had kanwa no they reason y said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla y said no they fight you jmy'a except en qra mhsnh or de behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a y their hearts shta that banhm qwm no they reason y said y tnswn yourselves y you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.fr: ô Hisham certes the intellect with knowledge so he said et that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas et what he understands them except al'almwn ô Hisham then dhm those who non they reason so he said et when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? et if/had kan their forefathers non they reason anything et non they are guided et said et mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma non he hears except d'a' et nda' sm bkm 'my fhm non they reason et said et from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf et if/had kanwa non they reason et said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla et said non they fight you jmy'a except dans qra mhsnh or de behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a et their hearts shta that banhm qwm non they reason et said et tnswn yourselves et you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich the intellect with knowledge so he said und that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas und what he understands them except al'almwn o Hisham then dhm those who nicht they reason so he said und when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? und if/had kan their forefathers nicht they reason anything und nicht they are guided und said und mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma nicht he hears except d'a' und nda' sm bkm 'my fhm nicht they reason und said und from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf und if/had kanwa nicht they reason und said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla und said nicht they fight you jmy'a except in qra mhsnh or von behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a und their hearts shta that banhm qwm nicht they reason und said und tnswn yourselves und you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.ru: о Hisham поистине the intellect with knowledge so he said и that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas и what he understands them except al'almwn о Hisham then dhm those who не they reason so he said и when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? и if/had kan their forefathers не they reason anything и не they are guided и said и mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma не he hears except d'a' и nda' sm bkm 'my fhm не they reason и said и from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf и if/had kanwa не they reason и said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla и said не they fight you jmy'a except в qra mhsnh or из behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a и their hearts shta that banhm qwm не they reason и said и tnswn yourselves и you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 the intellect with knowledge so he said 和 that (f) alamthal ndrbha llnas 和 what he understands them except al'almwn 啊 Hisham then dhm those who 不 they reason so he said 和 when it was said lhm follow! what sent down Allah they said rather ntb' what we found upon him our forefathers is? 和 if/had kan their forefathers 不 they reason anything 和 不 they are guided 和 said 和 mthl those who disbelieved kmthl who/which bleats bma 不 he hears except d'a' 和 nda' sm bkm 'my fhm 不 they reason 和 said 和 from them who/whoever he listens to you is? fant tsm' the deaf 和 if/had kanwa 不 they reason 和 said or thsb that most of them they hear or they reason if they except kalan'am rather they more astray sbyla 和 said 不 they fight you jmy'a except 在 qra mhsnh or 从 behind jdr bashm between them shdyd thsbhm jmy'a 和 their hearts shta that banhm qwm 不 they reason 和 said 和 tnswn yourselves 和 you (pl) ttlwn alktab is? fla t'qlwn
